name: diplomat-device-allocator
description: Local resource-allocation manager: hands out exclusive iOS simulators / Android emulators to AI agents and reclaims them when the agent dies or the device goes idle.

scripts.test: node test/paths.mjs && node test/integration.mjs && node test/mcp-protocol.mjs && node test/agent-kill.mjs && node test/report-injection-nonblocking.mjs && node test/report-injection-utf8.mjs && node test/idle-sweep-repairing-race.mjs && node test/repair-completion-identity.mjs && node test/deviceid-claim-booting-lease.mjs && node test/android-wipe-shuts-down-running-instance.mjs && node test/android-wipe-fails-when-lock-never-releases.mjs
